title: alectorolophus arvernensis
intro: Alectorolophus arvernensis is a type of fern, specifically a species of lycopod, that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Alectorolophus arvernensis include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying and crushing its leaves, which can then be used in teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
